_comment: Publish-console 'App config' template (deployment defaults, becomes ENCLAVE_CONFIG via configCid). 'volumes' names the attested model volumes the platform attaches (the wasm-manager mounts each at /models/<name> in the guest - no paths here by design). The 'models' catalog is stated in FULL for all three ggml volumes; the retired onnx volume qwen2.5-0.5b is gone from the gpu fleet so its entry is dropped here (the catalog embedded in the wasm keeps it for local dev). qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf sets tokenizer_file to null EXPLICITLY: ENCLAVE_CONFIG merges per FIELD into the embedded catalog, whose entry still points tokenizer_file at the retired onnx volume - omitting the key would keep that stale cross-volume path, null clears it so the re-wrapped volume's own bundled tokenizer.json serves. 122b/9b geometry from the volumes' GGUF headers (qwen35moe/qwen35) + the shared Qwen3.5 tokenizer; both open replies with a <think> block, which the large max_new budgets and rep_penalty 1 (penalties distort long reasoning) are sized for. kv_layers counts only the FULL-ATTENTION layers (hybrid models keep no KV in the linear-attention ones) so the app's VRAM pricing - weights + KV at the NODE's window (llama.cpp allocates the whole ENCLAVE_GGML_N_CTX up front, not the app's prompt budget) + ~1.5 GB working set - is honest. The 122b needs >=~50% GPU share; the 9b needs ~12 GB (5.6 weights + 4.3 KV at the 256K node window + working set) = gpu 0.09; under that the app now refuses it cleanly instead of the tenant dying by CUDA OOM mid-compute. qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf runs its full native window (32k = 24576 prompt + 8192 gen cap; the embedded 3072 was sized for the retired onnx guest-memory path - ggml KV lives host-side, and the node's ENCLAVE_GGML_N_CTX 262144 already covers it). Largest attached model serves as the default.

qwen3.5-122b-gguf.name: qwen3.5-122b-a10b
qwen3.5-122b-gguf.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.

qwen3.5-9b-gguf.name: qwen3.5-9b
qwen3.5-9b-gguf.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.

qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf.name: qwen2.5-0.5b-instruct-gguf
qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.
